result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d cultivate a global culture that prioritizes empathy, cooperation, and shared responsibility—so that every person’s basic needs are met, the planet is cared for, and decisions are guided by genuine concern for one another rather than short‑term profit or power. Imagine a world where people routinely ask “how can we help each other thrive?” instead of “how can we outdo each other?”—that shift would ripple through every system, from economics to education to environmental stewardship, creating a more just, resilient, and compassionate society for all.

Imagine a world where people routinely ask “how can we help each other thrive?” instead of “how can we outdo each other?”—that shift would ripple through every system, from economics to education to environmental stewardship, creating a more just, resilient, and compassionate society for all.
